description: §61.3 — an `<endpoint>` with no `accepts=` enum type fires E-ENDPOINT-ACCEPTS-MISSING. The request body decodes into `accepts=` via parseVariant (§41.13); without it there is nothing to decode or dispatch.
rationale: §61.3: an `<endpoint>` SHALL declare an `accepts=` :enum type — the typed inbound surface is required. A missing accepts= is E-ENDPOINT-ACCEPTS-MISSING (parse-time, W2 — the catch-all mirroring §60.9's E-API-ENDPOINT-MALFORMED).
